body.title: CLOSED: ultrathink plan review in sprint-ticket
body.result: ultrathink instruction added to sprint-ticket Step 4, conditional on L/XL or HIGH-inertia
body.description:
sprint-ticket Step 4 (review the plan) asks for a 1-3 sentence plan summary and an inertia check, but does not require deep reasoning for high-stakes work. L/XL tickets and HIGH-inertia touches are where an undercooked plan causes the most damage — a wrong approach on an XL ticket wastes hours.

Amend ~/.claude/skills/sprint-ticket Step 4 to add: 'For L/XL or HIGH-inertia tickets: before finalizing the plan, ultrathink — reason deeply about what could go wrong, what constraints are hidden, whether the scope is truly minimal, and whether the affected files list is complete. Do not proceed to Step 5 (infrastructure brief) until the ultrathink pass is complete and the plan survives scrutiny.' The ultrathink keyword triggers extended reasoning on that step.

**Affected files:** ~/.claude/skills/sprint-ticket (Step 4 text amendment only)
**Design rules:** skill-file edit only — no code changes; ultrathink instruction must be conditional (L/XL or HIGH-inertia), not unconditional
**Scope boundary:** In: Step 4 text amendment. Out: modifying other steps, adding ultrathink to /design or /decided.
**Test plan:** sprint-ticket skill text contains ultrathink instruction scoped to L/XL and HIGH-inertia. S/M tickets without HIGH-inertia do not trigger ultrathink (conditional wording verified).
